## Problem

What can't you do right now that you want to do?

## Proposed solution

How should Shard behave?

## Alternative approaches

What else have you considered?

## Context

- What kind of artifacts are you managing? (models, datasets, checkpoints, etc.)
- What's your P2P network topology? (LAN, cloud peers, mixed)
